description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Create a new account, choose the lowest-priced membership plan that costs at most $30 per month, and complete all required basic profile fields including a city-level location, an industry, and a short bio.

expected_values.bio: Early-stage founder building a SaaS product for small businesses.

tasks.name: Create a new account, choose the lowest-priced membership plan that costs at most $30 per month, and complete all required basic profile fields including a city-level location, an industry, and a short bio.
tasks.description: Create a new account, choose the lowest-priced membership plan that costs at most $30 per month, and complete all required basic profile fields including a city-level location, an industry, and a short bio.

tasks.instruction: After logging in, find and join three groups that are clearly related to technology (for example by category or tags) that you are not already a member of.
tasks.name: After logging in, find and join three groups that are clearly related to technology (for example by category or tags) that you are not already a member of.
tasks.description: After logging in, find and join three groups that are clearly related to technology (for example by category or tags) that you are not already a member of.

tasks.instruction: While logged in, find online events happening within the next 30 days that cost under $50, sort them by price from low to high, and register for the cheapest eligible one.
tasks.name: While logged in, find online events happening within the next 30 days that cost under $50, sort them by price from low to high, and register for the cheapest eligible one.
tasks.description: While logged in, find online events happening within the next 30 days that cost under $50, sort them by price from low to high, and register for the cheapest eligible one.

tasks.instruction: From the member directory, find three people located in your city who identify as founders with at least five years of experience and send each of them a connection request, excluding anyone you are already connected to.
tasks.name: From the member directory, find three people located in your city who identify as founders with at least five years of experience and send each of them a connection request, excluding anyone you are already connected to.
tasks.description: From the member directory, find three people located in your city who identify as founders with at least five years of experience and send each of them a connection request, excluding anyone you are already connected to.

tasks.instruction: In your billing or membership settings, identify all plans that include event discounts and switch your subscription to the one with the lowest monthly price.
tasks.name: In your billing or membership settings, identify all plans that include event discounts and switch your subscription to the one with the lowest monthly price.
tasks.description: In your billing or membership settings, identify all plans that include event discounts and switch your subscription to the one with the lowest monthly price.

tasks.instruction: Go to a group that focuses on marketing or growth and publish a new collaboration post that clearly states a specific budget and an approximate three‑month timeline.
tasks.name: Go to a group that focuses on marketing or growth and publish a new collaboration post that clearly states a specific budget and an approximate three‑month timeline.
tasks.description: Go to a group that focuses on marketing or growth and publish a new collaboration post that clearly states a specific budget and an approximate three‑month timeline.

tasks.instruction: Use the member directory to find one person in a technology-related industry with at least 10 years of experience who indicates they are open to mentoring, then bookmark or save their profile to a mentor-focused list.
tasks.name: Use the member directory to find one person in a technology-related industry with at least 10 years of experience who indicates they are open to mentoring, then bookmark or save their profile to a mentor-focused list.
tasks.description: Use the member directory to find one person in a technology-related industry with at least 10 years of experience who indicates they are open to mentoring, then bookmark or save their profile to a mentor-focused list.

tasks.instruction: Open your list of events you’re registered for, select the next upcoming event, find an attendee who is already one of your connections, and send them a message proposing a 30‑minute meeting during the event.
tasks.name: Open your list of events you’re registered for, select the next upcoming event, find an attendee who is already one of your connections, and send them a message proposing a 30‑minute meeting during the event.
tasks.description: Open your list of events you’re registered for, select the next upcoming event, find an attendee who is already one of your connections, and send them a message proposing a 30‑minute meeting during the event.

tasks.instruction: Update your notification preferences so that all email notifications are turned off, but in‑app notifications remain enabled for new private messages and event updates.
tasks.name: Update your notification preferences so that all email notifications are turned off, but in‑app notifications remain enabled for new private messages and event updates.
